title: Cobblemon Pokemon Hider
description: Allows users to hide Pokémon based on what category they fall into, preventing players from griefing during events with their Pokémon.
body:
Cobblemon Pokémon Hider is a client-side mod that prevents Pokémon models from rendering depending on which settings have been toggled. Users can choose to hide wild Pokémon, Pokémon they own, or Pokémon owned by anyone else. This mod was really created for the Cobblemon Delta server to prevent players from griefing with their Pokémon during events. However, this mod should support any server and work on single player worlds as well.

This mod does not change or delete Pokémon in any way. It simply skips rendering their models so that players can play without the visual spam.
